title: Remove network-cmd-path config
body:
As part of slirp removal
RUN-3569

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: ✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6608**

Waiting on tests to finish on the Podman side: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27811

Once that goes green, we can merge this :). Prefer that we mere the Podman PR first, so it unblocks vendoring.
I think you missed one -> https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/common/pkg/config/containers.conf#L675  ... I assume this anyways
